response.original_title: Ghostnaps presents TAKE ME WITH YOU!!
response.overview: TAKE ME WITH YOU!! is the sophomore album and debut visual film from Ghostnaps, the solo project of Boston-based artist and producer Richard Lathrop.
response.tagline: Thirty-two minutes inside the crack between a memory and the moment it starts to dissolve.
response.title: Ghostnaps presents TAKE ME WITH YOU!!
